violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the: - Hoods have an accumulation of grease buildup. - Ice machine has an accumulation of orange/brown residue. - Freezers have an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
The condensate from the reach-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
